source_file: O:\Commun\Support\Finance projects- IT\CONNEXION ADP\ADP Agicap en SFTP.msg
fact: Agicap confirmed the Sage invoice connection uses an API with two synchronizations per day at 06:00 and 13:00.
claude_action: Use to distinguish invoice synchronization from payment-file transmission in the current architecture.

source_file: O:\Commun\Support\Finance projects- IT\CONNEXION ADP\ADP Agicap en SFTP.msg
fact: For payroll payment file upload, the process remains based on SFTP and SEPA files rather than the API invoice connection.
claude_action: Treat payroll and vendor-payment integration flows separately in the target-state map.

source_file: O:\Commun\Support\Finance projects- IT\CONNEXION ADP\ADP Agicap en SFTP.msg
fact: The ADP integration pricing referenced in the email is 500 euros for implementation and 50 euros per month for extra maintenance.
claude_action: Use as support context if commercial comparison of sub-integrations becomes relevant.

source_file: O:\Commun\Support\Finance projects- IT\CONNEXION ADP\RE GO for EBICS T contrat signature with SG.msg
fact: ADP payroll transmission required EBICS T setup with the bank before production, with tests expected before the July payroll run.
claude_action: Map EBICS T as an implementation dependency for payroll-bank connectivity.

source_file: O:\Commun\Support\Finance projects- IT\CONNEXION ADP\RE GO for EBICS T contrat signature with SG.msg
fact: ADP requested either the signed EBICS T contract or the user ID, partner ID, and file format details to proceed.
claude_action: Use as evidence of the specific bank-connectivity prerequisites in the payroll payment stream.

source_file: O:\Commun\Support\Finance projects- IT\CONNEXION ADP\RE Contrat EBICS T - ADP  SG - Points sur les contrats OK SG.msg
fact: Societe Generale confirmed that the certificates were reconciled and activated for the EBICS T setup, and the transport user ID ST000091 is referenced.
claude_action: Use as evidence that the EBICS T connection progressed beyond planning into activation.
